task: Inspect plant room cleanliness. Clean as necessary.
Inspect for correct labelling. Do labelling as necessary.
Inspect emergency light. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect ventilation system. Repair as necessary.
Inspect condition of door. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect light intensity. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect floor trap/ drain to ensure good water flow. Repair as necessary.
Inspect pump circuit diagram (laminated & framed) are up to date. Replace as necessary.
Inspect pump layout diagram (laminated & framed) are up to date.  Replace as necessary.
Inspect portable fire extinguisher ( ABC Dry Poder  / CO2). Replace as necessary.
Inspect chemical dosing pumps for condenser water system. Check the correct chemical used. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect chillers general condition. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Take reading of current, voltage, pressure, temperature, etc. Compare with design readings. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect all seals, gaskets and pipes if leaks. Replace as necessary.
Inspect oil pressure.  If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect crankcase heater. Repair/  replace as necessary.
Inspect chilled water pressure drop across chillers and condenser. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect the operation of all safety devices. Clean, adjust, lubricate, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect purge unit operation.
Inspect the suction and discharge pressures of all refrigerant compressors. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Drain and flush purge unit. Replace oil.
Inspect all refrigerant and oil levels. Charge refrigerant and oil into the refrigerant system as necessary.
Clean condenser tubes.
Service chillers including changing of compressor oil, filter, leak test and topping up refrigerant.
Inspect condition of pumps. (Cleanliness/ appearance/ noise).
Inspect all pump bearings for excessive noise, vibration and wear. Lubricate with oil or grease and replace as necessary.
Inspect all motor bearings, lubricate with grease and replace as necessary.
Inspect carbon brushes and slip rings of all motors. Clean, repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect safety devices fitted to all motors. Clean, adjust, lubricate, repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect all seals for leakages. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Adjust, repack and replace pump glands as necessary.
Inspect each pump/ motor alignment, mountings and correct rotation. Adjust or replace as necessary.
Inspect all rubber couplings between pumps and drive motor. Replace as necessary.
Inspect all belt drives. Adjust and retension. Replace as necessary.
Inspect and tighten all bolts and nuts. Replace  as necessary.
Inspect and test pressure switches and gauges. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect and clean all electric motors. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect all motor bearings, lubricate with grease. Replace as necessary.
Inspect safety devices fitted to motors. Clean, adjust, lubricate, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect motor terminal connection. Check winding, clean and retighten as necessary.
Take reading of current,voltage,presssure,temperature, etc. Compare with design readings, if abnormal trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the panel and its housing. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test the control wiring and circuitry. Retighten, repair  or replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of selector switches. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of auto-manual selector switches. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of stop-start buttons. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect or replace indicating bulbs and covers as necessary.
Inspect the routine operation of all electrical starters, electrical control gears and ancillary electrical apparatus. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect all electrical contactors relays. Clean and retighten all loose connections.

Inspect electric fuses. Replace as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the conduits, supports and wires. Replace as necessary.
Inspect plant room cleanliness.
Inspect for correct labelling.
Inspect emergency light.
Inspect condition of door.
Inspect light intensity.
Inspect heat exchanger in a good condition. If abnormal, trace the faults and report to utilities provider.
Inspect all water cooling towers in a good condition. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect all fan and fan bearings. Lubricate with grease. Replace as necessary.
Inspect all belt drives. Adjust and retention. Replace as necessary.
Inspect and clean all water screens.
Inspect the operation of all cooling tower sprinkler head. Replace if necessary.
Inspect the operation of all spray nozzles and clean. Replace if necessary.
Drain, clean and flush cooling tower basin and honey-comb in-fills.
Inspect and clean float valve. Adjust water level. Replace if necessary.
Inspect and service motors and controllers. Replace as necessary.
Inspect all chilled water storage and expansion tanks, chilled water pipes, valves, etc. Clean, service and flush as necessary.
Inspect pipe insulation and pipe supports. Replace as necessary.
Inspect all measuring devices for correct operation. Repair or replace as necessary.
Conduct chilled water quality test.
Inspect all air-handling units and fan-coils. If abnormal, trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect all air filters. Clean or replace as necessary.
i. Primary filters.
ii. Secondary filters. (If available)
Inspect all chilled  water coils, seals and pipe lines for leaks. Rectify as necessary.
Inspect all fans and fan bearings. Lubricate with grease. Replace as necessary.
Inspect the routine operation of all automatic temperature control gears and relay.
Inspect all bearings, pivots and other moving parts. Clean, adjust, lubricate and replace as necessary.
Inspect all belt drives. Adjust and retension. Replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of all automatic water regulating valves. Clean, adjust, lubricate and replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of all automatic multi-blade face and by-pass damper. Clean, adjust and lubricate as necessary.
Inspect operation of thermostat. Replace as necessary.
Inspect and clean strainers. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Clean cooling coil with high pressure water jet and alkaline cleaning chemicals.
Inspect insulation. Repair or replace  as necessary.
Inspect and clean all electric motors. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect all motor bearings and lubricate with grease. Replace as necessary.
Inspect safety devices fitted to motors. Clean, adjust, lubricate, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect leaks at joints, fittings and piping. Repair as necessary.
Inspect leakage or clogging at drain pan and drain line. Clean, flush, repair or replace as necessary.
Manually turn blower(s) wheel. It should run smoothly there should be no excessive noise.
Inspect all heater elements and other accessories. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the operation of CO2 probe and detector and damper (if available). Clean, adjust, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect all grilles, dampers including shutters if available are working correctly. Clean, adjust, repair or replace as necessary.
Measure air flow. Adjust and balance air flow as necessary.
Inspect ductwork for leaks, damage or corrosion. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect for moisture and condensation. Repair or replace insulation as necessary.
Inspect duct insulation for tears and air leaks. Patch or replace as necessary.
Inspect the internal of ducting to determine dust built up. Repair and clean as necessary.
Inspect internal insulation supply duct after AHU. (If applicable)

Inspect, measure and adjust air balancing for all AHU as per technical requirement. 
(Note : Works to be delivered by 2029 or 2030 as per FSO instruction)

Clean rust and paint with appropriate one layer of anti-rust paint and finished with existing coloured paint.
Redo all arrow and labeling.
Control and monitoring of all fire systems.
Man in the fire control room during and after office hours ( 24 hours )

Inspect, repair or replace and test the operation of the complete fire fighting system, including the interface and operation of other systems such as lift, ventilation, smoke spill, pressurization, etc.
Test run fire fighting system and simulate fire alarm to ensure all systems are in good working order. Ensure the BOMBA link is operating.
Attend to any complaint, urgent request or complaints raised by the FSO/ SO/ Owner with regards to daily operation.
Conduct fire drill with Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (JBPM) for each block / complex c/w fire extinguisher, fuel, warning sign, training fee, meal during meeting and necessary equipment.
Inspect plant room cleanliness. Clean as necessary.
Inspect for correct labelling. Do labelling as necessary.

Inspect and report for integrity of structure. Rectify as necessary.

Inspect electrode and clean. Repair or replace as necessary (if equipped).

Inspect internal and external cat ladder.  Repair/repaint or replace as necessary.
Record water level in log book all fire fighting tank

Test run each pump on automatic and manual mode. Repair as necessary.
Inspect the correct cut-in or cut-out auto mode operation of the pressure switch. Check pressures. Repair / replaceas necessary.
Inspect all motor bearings, lubricate with grease and replace as necessary.
Inspect all motor bearings for excessive noise, vibration and wear. Lubricate with oil or grease and replace as necessary.

Inspect the operation of stop-start buttons. Repair or replace as necessary.

Replace electrical fuses as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the conduits, supports and wires. Replace as necessary.
Inspect or replace indicating bulbs and covers.
Inspect the condition of every pipe. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the pipe supports, brackets, pipe sleeves and piping joints (mechanical coupling/ welded coupling/ threated coupling/ etc.). Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the condition of every valve ( including motorised valves - depend on 20 years lifecycle for motorised valve only ) and fitting. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and clean strainers. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect for correct labeling. Clean and relabeling as necessary.
Inspect fire fighting chilled water pipe insulation. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect painting. Ensure pipes coating of anti rust and standard colour paint are clean and in good condition. Replace or repaint as necessary.
Inspect that the landing valve, canvas hose and hose reel are obstruction free.
Inspect any missing, damaged or deteriorated parts on the landing valve, canvas hose, diffuser nozzle, cradle, hose reel drum and hose reel. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the ease of operation and swing of each cradle and hose reel drum. Adjust, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect for any leaks or drips at the landing valves, drum goose neck and gate valve. Repair or replace as necessary.
Ensure that each of the landing valves is complete with the blank cap, chain and the hand wheel. Repair or replace as necessary.
Ensure that the diffuser nozzle & landing valve hand wheel can be operated freely. Repair or replace as necessary.
Ensure the hose is not twisted or curled.
Test hose reel and canvas hose for leakage. Replace as necessary.
Inspect and test system for leaks. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect that the sprinkler heads are obstruction free. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect that the sprinkler heads are free of foreign matter and suspended object. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect any missing, damaged or deteriorated parts on the sprinkler head. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect for any leaks or drips at the sprinkler heads. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect for leaks within the system by reading on the pressure gauges. Repair as necessary.
Inspect and ensure the proper operation of water alarm gongs/ buzzer/ siren. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the flow switches and its signal indication. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the Jabatan Bomba dan Penyelamat Malaysia (JBPM) breeching inlet and its access. Repair or replace as necessary.
Record pressure water in pipe line at header pipe
Inspect the condition of breeching box, door and lock. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the condition of male couplings, back pressure valves, blank caps (secured with chain). Repair or replace as necessary.

Inspect fire detection and alarm system. Trace the faults and rectify as necessary.
Inspect and test all main power supply and earthing.  Adjust, retighten, repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test all battery charger units. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect all battery alarm panel. Replace to ensure functionality. ( depend on 2 years lifecycle )
Inspect and test illumination lamps and LEDs. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test the functionality of break-glass unit or manual call point. Repair or replace as necessary.
Test zone rotary switch for functionality. Repair or replace as necessary.

Inspect and test system wiring. Repair or replace as necessary.
Test bell or buzzer and isolation button. Repair or replace as necessary.
Test alarm and evacuation switch. Repair or replace as necessary.

Print out the previous month detection and alarm history. Analyze and take appropriate actions. - submit report to FSO

Inspect the condition of the discharge valve and the tamper seal. Repair or replace to ensure funcionality.
Inspect and test gas discharge abort switch. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test control panel. Repair or replace as necessary.
Visually inspect condition of components, resistors wires, zone cards, etc. Repair or replace as necessary.

Inspect and test of change over switch. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test indicator bulbs. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect condition of battery chargers. Repair or replace as necessary.

Inspect and test the control wiring and circuitry. Retighten, repair or replace as necessary.
Ensure that the detectors are free from obstructions, dust, dirt and cobwebs. Clean as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the manual key switch/ pull handle. Repair or replace as necessary.
Conduct simulation test (minus gas discharge).
Inspect and adjust to ensure that the time delay for the CO2 discharge is within 25 – 30 seconds. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test the correct operation of interface trip and fire curtain. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect and test the correct operation of the bell and warning light. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect the condition of the manual key switch or pull handle. Replace glass as necessary.
Check all electrical connections to ensure operation of the system in the event of a fire. Repair or replace as necessary.
Make a general visual inspection of all aerosol generators for damage or missing parts. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect condensed aerosol generators for physical damage, such as cracks, dents, distortion or corosion. Repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect mounting brackets, straps and associated hardware for loose, damage or broken parts. Replace damage part and tighten all loose hardware.
Inspect all electrical control equipments for cracks, broken or cracked glass plate, dirt or distortion. Clean and repair or replace as necessary.
Inspect all electrical connection and run electrical continuity test using Ohmmeter. Repair and replace as necesssary.
Obtain Bomba certification upon expiry date.

Carry out effluent sampling  by accredited lab in accordance with the requirement of MS 1228:1991 or approved equivalent standards. The report shall be submitted to FSO/ SO/ Owner which consist of the following parameters but not limited to:
1) pH value
2) BOD-5Days@20 degree Celcius
3) Chemical Oxygen Demand (COD)
4) Suspended Solid
5) Oil & Grease
FM Contractor shall take action to ensure the quality of effluent to be complied with the Environmental Quality (Sewage and Industrial Effluents) Regulation, 1979.
